intro: Find schemes aligned to where you are in your startup journey.

stages.title: Ideation
stages.description: You have an idea but no prototype or product yet

stages.title: Prototype / PoC
stages.description: Idea validated, building or testing a prototype

stages.title: Seed / Early-Stage
stages.description: Prototype done; entering market or scaling pilot

stages.title: Growth / Scaling
stages.description: Product in market; scaling operations and team

stages.title: Market Access & IP
stages.description: Ready to sell, export or protect your innovation
